details.test: Task 1: Book cheapest 5' x 10' mobile pod within 10 miles
Task 2: Size guide – 1BR apartment under $150/month for 3 months
Task 3: Choose between standard and climate-controlled 10' x 10'
Task 4: Apply weekend move-in promo code to Saturday booking
Task 5: Add packing supplies under $40 budget
Task 6: Storage calculator – book recommended pod for 2 months starting May 1
Task 7: Find nearest location within 5 miles of 30309 and start booking
Task 8: Reschedule existing pod delivery to Saturday 3+ days later
Task 9: Same-day pickup and redelivery with earliest window, preferring 9–1
